resultList.dtldesc: Experience the epitome of luxury living with this magnificent 5 BHK residence now available for sale in the prestigious neighborhood of Thaltej, Ahmedabad. Boasting a sprawling super built-up area of 6995 square feet and complete furniture available, this opulent property offers unparalleled comfort, elegance, and sophistication.Property SpecificationsThis vaastu-compliant masterpiece, facing the serene South, offers unparalleled comfort and elegance across two expansive floors, encompassing the 11th and 12th floors of the building. With a carpet area of 1500 square feet, the terrace provides a serene retreat to soak in panoramic views and enjoy leisurely moments.As you step into the 11th floor, youre greeted by four lavishly appointed bedrooms, each offering a haven of tranquility. Six meticulously designed bathrooms, including five attached and one common, feature modern Western fixtures and geysers, ensuring ultimate comfort and convenience for residents. A balcony off the bedrooms offers a charming space to bask in the natural beauty of the surroundings. The modular kitchen, complete with a chimney and piped gas connection, beckons culinary enthusiasts to create gourmet delights, while the utility area attached to the kitchen adds to the functionality of the space. The flooring throughout exudes opulence with pristine marble, enhancing the ambience of every room.Ascending to the 12th floor, youll find a spacious bedroom with two bathrooms, both featuring Western amenities and geysers. A balcony extends from the bedroom, offering breathtaking views of the surroundings, while the rest of the floor opens up to a vast terrace, ideal for hosting gatherings or simply enjoying alfresco living at its finest.Facilities Residents of this prestigious abode enjoy access to three covered parking spaces, ensuring convenience and security for their vehicles. With reliable water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, along with 100 power backup, uninterrupted living is guaranteed. Additionally, the building boasts top-notch security measures, ensuring peace of mind for residents.Locality Conveniently located near Palladium Mall, this residence offers easy access to essential amenities such as schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets, all within a convenient 1-km radius. Banks and ATMs are also readily accessible, catering to your financial needs with ease. Excellent public transportation options, including the railway station and metro station, are just 1 km away, ensuring seamless connectivity to other parts of the city.
